title: quercus croatica var. typica
intro: Quercus croatica var. typica, also known as the Croatian or Balkan white oak, is a variety of the Quercus croatica species native to the Balkan Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to the presence of polyphenols and flavonoids. The health benefits of Quercus croatica var. typica include lowering cholesterol levels, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of certain cancers and neurodegenerative diseases. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and immune function.
